metadata.title: neuronest eCommerce — Smart. Seamless. Shopping.
metadata.description: Launch and scale your online store with neuronest eCommerce — an intelligent, multi-tenant platform built for modern brands.

hero.title: Build smarter stores.
hero.subtitle: neuronest eCommerce combines intelligent automation, multi-store management, and a beautiful shopping experience — everything you need to grow your brand online.

features.title: Everything your store needs
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for merchants, delightful experiences built for shoppers.

multiStore.title: Multi-Store Management
multiStore.description: Run multiple brands from one dashboard with subdomain-based store routing and isolated catalogs.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: Accept payments globally with Stripe integration, real-time order tracking, and automated receipts.

admin.title: Powerful Admin Dashboard
admin.description: Manage products, categories, orders, and customers with an intuitive React-based admin panel.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Keep customers engaged with OTP verification, order updates, and real-time email notifications.

seo.title: SEO-Ready Storefront
seo.description: SEO-friendly product URLs, fast Next.js rendering, and optimized performance out of the box.

scalable.title: Built to Scale
scalable.description: NestJS backend with MongoDB, Docker-ready deployment, and a modern full-stack architecture.

howItWorks.title: Launch in three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From setup to your first sale — neuronest makes it effortless.

create.title: Create Your Store
create.description: Set up your brand in minutes through the admin dashboard. Add your logo, configure your subdomain, and you're ready.

catalog.title: Build Your Catalog
catalog.description: Add products, categories, and brands. Upload images, set pricing, and organize your inventory with ease.

sell.title: Start Selling
sell.description: Your storefront goes live instantly. Customers browse, checkout securely, and you manage everything from one place.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. Scale as you grow.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for new brands launching their first store.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing businesses managing multiple brands.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Full power for large-scale commerce operations.

cta.title: Ready to transform your commerce?
cta.subtitle: Join forward-thinking brands using neuronest eCommerce to deliver smart, seamless shopping experiences.
cta.note: No credit card required. Setup in under 10 minutes.
